name: A1 School Bus
registry_source: PA Department of State business entity registry (entity #4016145) via city-data.com mirror
notes: FMCSA USDOT 2203931 for A-1 SCHOOL BUS LLC reported as INACTIVE in SAFER as of fetch; carrier is listed by SearchCarriers/QuickTransportSolutions at 7024 City Ave, Philadelphia (not the 7248 Woodland Ave input address); PA SOS entity #4016145 'A-1 School Bus, L.L.C.' registered 03/10/2011 in Philadelphia, status Active. Input name/city match PA entity; FMCSA snapshot returned inactive so power units/drivers not retrievable. Confidence medium because PA entity match is solid but USDOT record currently inactive.

name: Dependability Co
registry_source: PA Department of State business entity registry (entity name 'Dependability Bus Co LLC' confirmed in multiple registries; formation date not retrieved from accessible sources)
notes: FMCSA match is high-confidence: legal name DEPENDABILITY BUS CO LLC at 1300 Adams Ave, Philadelphia PA 19124 exactly matches input address. Operating status active with USDOT and MC authority not authorized for interstate for-hire (intrastate only). 24 power units, 16 drivers per snapshot, MCS-150 last updated 04/30/2014 (data flagged outdated). PA SOS confirms an active 'Dependability Bus Co LLC' entity (and a related 'Dependability Company, LLC' has been referenced in NLRB cases at 3955 Frankford Ave) but the SOS formation date was not retrievable via accessible search; bizapedia/SOS portals require interactive access.

name: Joiner Enterprises
officers: Rick Joiner (likely principal; contact phone listed)
registry_source: Third-party business directories (D&B, Manta, Yellow Pages) report MO incorporation in 2007; Missouri SOS bsd.sos.mo.gov portal not directly queryable via WebFetch
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record found that matches Joiner Enterprises at 507 E Jackson St, Marshfield, MO 65706. USDOT 329079 'JOINER ENTERPRISES INC' exists but its physical address is 4970 Joiner Circle, Milton, FL 32583 - a different (Florida) carrier with the same name, so excluded. The Marshfield MO operation may run intrastate school bus routes that are exempt from USDOT registration, or it operates under a related DBA (e.g., 'Joiner Hob School Bus Barn' at same address, founded 2007). MO Secretary of State formation/charter number was not retrievable through accessible web sources. Confidence on FMCSA is low because no confident match exists.

name: Rayco School Trnsprtn Inc
registry_source: No accessible PA Department of State or FMCSA record found for an exact-match entity 'Rayco School Transportation Inc' at Rd #4, Tyrone, PA 16686
notes: FMCSA SAFER keyword searches for 'RAYCO', 'RAYCO SCHOOL' returned zero matches in the carrier database. OpenCorporates lists PA Rayco entities (Rayco Automotive Services, Rayco Builders) but none in Tyrone/school transportation. Public references to current Tyrone Area School District bus contractors identify 'Raystown Transit' and 'Beckwith Busing' - not Rayco - which suggests Rayco School Transportation Inc may be defunct/dissolved or a historical PUC certificate holder no longer operating. Address 'Rd # 4, Tyrone, PA 16686' is a legacy rural-route style address consistent with an older filing. Insufficient confident data to populate any FMCSA or registry fields.

name: Kabata Transportation Inc
officers: Jason Kabata, Sarah Kabata (per FMCSA/business directory references)
registry_source: PA Department of State business entity registry (entity #3020880 per b2bhint mirror); formation date not retrievable from accessible sources
notes: FMCSA match high-confidence: legal name KABATA TRANSPORTATION INC at 19 Kabata Rd, Shickshinny PA 18655 (slightly different from the input 87 Silo Rd address, but the company also operates a Silo Rd facility per Yellow Pages/Manta and same town/zip). Active intrastate non-hazmat operation, 34 power units (school buses) and 23 drivers, MCS-150 updated 10/23/2025 with 625,000 miles reported for 2025. PA entity number 3020880 is referenced for Kabata Transportation, Inc. on b2bhint (PA SOS mirror). Third-party sources give conflicting founding dates (2001 vs 2009); SOS-confirmed inc_date not retrievable through accessible web sources.
